sections.label: Lyrics
lines: [Intro, Atmospheric synths]
[Verse 1, Soft piano chords]
I saw the dawn rise from the depths of fear
Pharaoh’s pride washed in a tide so clear
The chariots sank in watery graves
But we stood tall, the ones He saves
[Pre-Chorus, Building tension]
In the storm He whispered light
Shadow turned to blazing might
[Chorus, Ethereal echo harmonies]
The Lord is my strength, my unshaken song
My rescue in battle, where I belong
He is my God, I will lift His name
My father’s God — forever the same
[Verse 2, Minimal beat returns]
Your breath split the sea, a holy fire
Guided feet through flood and mire
The depths froze still at Your command
And we crossed safely, hand in hand
[Pre-Chorus, Vocal layering]
You reign in mercy, clothed in flame
Nations tremble at Your name
[Chorus, with harmony and vocal layering]
The Lord is my strength, my unshaken song
My rescue in battle, where I belong
He is my God, I will lift His name
My father’s God — forever the same
[Bridge, Slow and haunting]
You planted us in promise ground
Built us up where grace is found
The earth stood still, the sea obeyed
For love that never will be swayed
[Chorus, Grand finale feel with vocal lift]
The Lord is my strength, my unshaken song
My rescue in battle, where I belong
He is my God, I will lift His name
My father’s God — forever the same
[Outro, Whispered vocals, ambient tones]
